description_long: This handcart features a rectangular wooden frame with a flat, slatted load platform and raised side rails for securing cargo. The cart is supported by four large, spoked wooden wheels, two on each side, which are attached to the lower frame. The side rails are evenly spaced and extend the full length of the cart, providing containment for transported items. At each end, the cart has a simple, straight bar handle integrated into the frame, allowing for easy pushing or pulling. The wood appears weathered, giving the cart a rustic, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or park environments. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality for transporting goods or materials.
description: A rustic wooden handcart with a slatted platform, raised side rails, and four large spoked wheels, designed for transporting goods.
description_view_0: Front view showing the straight bar handle, slatted platform, and the two front wheels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the cart, the four spoked wheels, and the continuous side rails.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back handle, slatted platform, and the rear wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the wheels and side rails.
